name: phaser
purpose: Browser 2D game framework used for rendering, scenes, input, audio, camera, asset loading, and the imperative shell around the deterministic platformer core.
licenseEvidence: npm registry metadata from `npm view phaser@4.2.0 license repository.url time --json` reported license `MIT` and repository `git+https://phaserjs@github.com/phaserjs/phaser.git`.
wellKnownEvidence: Phaser is the selected browser 2D game framework in PLAN.md and AGENTS.md and is a widely used HTML5 game framework.
